description: CompositionWhite jersey made of 100% polyester, engineered with ClimaCool technology, has a round neck, short sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes in grey on the shoulders, contoured sides and brand name in rubber print on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 30 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logosSweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this ClimaCool engineered jersey from adidas. The mesh panels regulate your body temperature keeping you fresh and comfortable, while the polyester fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with adidas trackpants and running shoes for the best results.Model statistics The model wears size M in jerseysHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
